who: procurement coordinators in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor onboarding documents/month
offer: For procurement coordinators in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 vendor onboarding documents/month, inefficient document collection causes delays in onboarding new vendors. We streamline the process instead of manual email requests and follow-ups.
problem: Inefficient collection of vendor onboarding documents
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement coordinators
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement coordinators with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among coordinators
try_it: Let users try status tracking for document submissions and Manual invoice entry form on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
